name: capa explorer
description: Identify capabilities in executable files using FLARE's capa framework.
longdescription:
capa explorer integrates the FLARE team's open-source [capa](https://github.com/mandiant/capa) framework with Binary Ninja. Run capa against the current BinaryView to identify program capabilities (e.g. installs services, communicates over HTTP, is a backdoor), then click matches to navigate the disassembly and highlight the features that triggered them. A Rule Generator tab helps build and test new capa rules from features extracted from the current function.

This is a UI plugin only. The analysis engine and the Binary Ninja feature extractor are provided by the `flare-capa` Python package, which is installed automatically from `requirements.txt`. You also need a local copy of the [capa rules](https://github.com/mandiant/capa-rules/releases) matching your installed capa version; the plugin will prompt for the directory on first run.

license.name: Apache-2.0
license.text: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0. See https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0 and the bundled LICENSE file.

installinstructions.Darwin: Binary Ninja installs `flare-capa` from requirements.txt automatically. On first run, open the capa explorer sidebar and point it at a capa rules directory.
installinstructions.Linux: Binary Ninja installs `flare-capa` from requirements.txt automatically. On first run, open the capa explorer sidebar and point it at a capa rules directory.
installinstructions.Windows: Binary Ninja installs `flare-capa` from requirements.txt automatically. On first run, open the capa explorer sidebar and point it at a capa rules directory.
